name: Chatwoot
description: Connect Chatwoot as a communication channel — route conversations through Hay's AI orchestrator and escalate back to Chatwoot human agents

baseUrl.label: Chatwoot Base URL
baseUrl.description: Your Chatwoot instance URL (e.g., https://app.chatwoot.com for cloud, or your self-hosted URL)

accountId.label: Account ID
accountId.description: Your Chatwoot account ID (the number in your Chatwoot dashboard URL)

botAccessToken.label: Agent Bot Access Token
botAccessToken.description: The access_token returned when you created the Agent Bot in Chatwoot

webhookSecret.label: Webhook Secret
webhookSecret.description: The Webhook Secret shown on the Agent Bot's Edit page in Chatwoot — used to verify the HMAC-SHA256 signature on every inbound webhook

defaultEscalationTeamId.label: Escalation Team ID (optional)
defaultEscalationTeamId.description: When the AI hands off to a human, assign the Chatwoot conversation to this team
